component.name: Pannex
component.summary: Screenshot annotation tool for technical writers

description.p: Pannex (Picture Annotation Extension) is a screenshot annotation tool designed for technical writers and documentation workflows. It works as a natural extension of your desktop — capture or open a screenshot, annotate it with arrows, boxes, text, step markers, and highlights, then save or publish directly to your server.

ul.li: Arrow, rectangle, oval, line, freehand, and text annotation tools
Numbered step markers for procedural documentation
Transform tool with rotate, flip, and resize
Crop, remove whitespace, and pixelate regions
FTP, FTPS, and SFTP publishing with saved destinations
System, Light, and Dark theme support
Pixel grid overlay for precise editing

description.p: Pannex is built for speed and simplicity. Open your screenshot, add your annotations, and move on.

screenshot.caption: Annotating a screenshot with arrows and step markers
